steps.title: Recognize the complex series
steps.content: The sentence lists key years: 1916, 1936, and 1943. Because the list items contain internal commas and explanatory clauses, semicolons are needed to separate the major items clearly.

steps.title: Mark the final item
steps.content: B omits the needed separator, C creates a fragment after a period, and D uses only a comma. The second and third list items should be separated with a semicolon before and. The answer is A.
